title: Para Para Paravai Ondru Lyrics NeerParavai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Para Para Paravai Ondru Lyrics
Singer: Shreya Ghosal
Movie: Neer Paravai
Music: N. R. Raghunanthan
Lyrics : Vairamuthu

Para para paravai ondru
kara kara karaiyil nindru
kanneeril kadalai ninaikudhey,

Kada Kada kadalukkulley
pada pada idhyam thaedi
kannellam thee valarthu thuddikudhey

Endhevan pona dhisayile
jeevan serthu anupinen
en jeevan vandhu seruma !!
dhegam meendum vaazhuma !!

idho endhan kanneer andha azhaiyil serum
azhai marupadi unnidam varuma (...Para para paravai )

Thanneeril valayum nirkum
Thanneeraa valayil nirkum
En dhevan eppodhum thirigiraan

Kaatrukku thamilum theriyum
Kannaalan dhisaiyum theriyum
Kattaayam thunbam sollum marakiraan

Unnadhu vervayin maarbukkul
pisukku pisukkendru kidakudhey
Eera veravaigal theerum mun
Ennadhu uyir pasi kaaivadhaa

Vaanum mannum koodum podhu
naanum neeyum koodaamal
vazhavadhu kodumai  .....Para para .....

Oorengum mazhayum illai
Verungum puyalum illai
Endraalum nenjil idi idikudhey

Kannaalan nilamai enna
Kadalodu paarthu solla
Kokkukum naaraikum kan alayudhey

Neerin magan enhan kaadhalan
Neerin karunayil vazhvaan
Indru naalaikul meeluvaan
Enadhu penmayayai aaluvaan

Ennai meendum theeendum podhu
Kadal dhevan iru murai
mudhal Iravugal tharuvaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Neer Paravai, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Shreya Ghoshal, known for her melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Para Para Paravai Ondru was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, who is known for his unique sound in Tamil cinema.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 1, 2012, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Para Para Paravai Ondru, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the lens of love and longing. The song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of the characters in Neer Paravai, as they navigate their romantic relationship amidst life's challenges. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Shreya Ghoshal's captivating voice adds depth to the emotions, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Para Para Paravai Ondru is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals and N. R. Raghunanthan's soulful composition, this song from the film Neer Paravai resonates deeply with listeners. Dive into a world of emotions as the lyrics penned by Vairamuthu unfold a poignant tale of romance.
stanzaMeanings: A bird is standing on the shore, thinking about the sea with tears in its eyes.
In love, searching for the essence, the eyes are ignited with passion.
In the direction where my God has gone, I have sent my life; will my life come back to me? Will my body live again?
Here are my tears, will they come back to you in that call? (...A bird...)
In water, the ring stays; in water, it stays; my God always returns.
The wind knows Tamil; the lover knows the direction; the pain of the bond is expressed.
Your strength will not be lost; it will come back to me before my hunger for life fades.
When the sky and earth unite, it is hard for you and me to live apart... A bird...
There is no rain in the town; there is no storm; still, this pain is in my heart.
What is my state, oh lover? Tell me when you see love.
My son of the water is my lover; he lives in the grace of water; today, he will take my woman away.
When I am ignited again, the God of love will give me two nights.
In the direction where my God has gone, I have sent my life.
